# Description

Clean up .audiagentic/knowledge/

# Acceptance Criteria

- Files reviewed and organized
- Dependencies documented

# Notes

Part of request-19 code standards compliance cleanup.

# Completion Notes

Directory already clean and well-organized:
- config.yml: Knowledge vault configuration
- events/adapters.yml: Event adapter configuration
- events/handlers.yml: Event handler configuration
- profiles/selected.yml: Profile selection
